sections.paragraph:
Original: מכרתי

Transliteration: mekêrâthı̂y

Phonetic: mek-ay-raw-thee'

BDB Definition:

Mecherathite = "he of the dug-out" or " he of the digging tool"
  1. a native or inhabitant of Mecherah

Origin: patrial from an unused name (the same as H4380) of a place in Palestine

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
